LightningComponentBundle.description: A beautiful AI-powered CPQ chatbot integrated with Google Gemini. Allows users to build quotes using natural language commands with real-time cart management.

property.name: quoteId
property.label: Quote Record ID
property.description: The ID of the Quote record to add products to. Leave empty to auto-detect from record page.

property.name: isDarkMode
property.label: Enable Dark Mode
property.description: Toggle between dark and light theme.

property.name: quoteId
property.label: Quote Record ID
property.description: The ID of the Quote record to add products to.

property.name: isDarkMode
property.label: Enable Dark Mode
property.description: Toggle between dark and light theme.

property.name: quoteId
property.label: Quote Record ID
property.description: The ID of the Quote record to add products to.

property.name: isDarkMode
property.label: Enable Dark Mode
property.description: Toggle between dark and light theme.
